message:
chore: clippy and idiomatic-Rust cleanup across pt-core, pt-common, pt-config

Systematic pass addressing Clippy lints and Rust idiom improvements across
57 files (291 insertions, 240 deletions). No behavioral changes except one
missing assertion added in action_real.rs.

Source code (26 files):
- Replace mutable-then-assign patterns with struct literals + ..Default::default()
  (clippy::field_reassign_with_default) across config, inference, calibrate,
  collect, decision, supervision, daemon, output, and session modules
- Fix clippy::needless_return: remove explicit return Ok(()) at function ends
- Fix clippy::get_first: replace .get(0) with .first()
- Fix clippy::option_map_flatten: replace .map().flatten() with .and_then()

Test files (23 files):
- Same mutable-default-then-assign → struct literal cleanup
- Replace ProcessHarness::default() with unit struct construction ProcessHarness
- Add missing assertion in action_real.rs zombie process test

Cargo.toml:
- Gate tempfile dependency behind dep: syntax for test-tempdir feature (hygiene fix)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ sha2 = "0.10"
 hex = "0.4"
 rand = "0.9"
 toon = { workspace = true }
+tempfile = { version = "3", optional = true }
 
 # ECDSA signature verification for release binaries
 p256 = { version = "0.13", features = ["ecdsa"] }
@@ -66,7 +67,7 @@ daemon = []         # Dormant monitoring mode
 metrics = ["prometheus", "tiny_http"]  # Prometheus /metrics endpoint for daemon
 ui = ["ftui"]              # Premium TUI experience (ftui, Elm-style)
 test-utils = []     # Export test utilities for integration tests
-test-tempdir = []   # Enable tempdir helper in test utilities
+test-tempdir = ["dep:tempfile"]   # Enable tempdir helper in test utilities
 fleet-dns = []      # Enable DNS-based fleet discovery (scaffold)
 
 [dev-dependencies]

@@ -452,13 +452,13 @@ mod tests {
         let candidates = vec![
             EsnCandidate::new(
                 "z",
-                post.clone(),
+                post,
                 feasibility.clone(),
                 vec![ProbeType::QuickScan],
             ),
             EsnCandidate::new(
                 "a",
-                post.clone(),
+                post,
                 feasibility.clone(),
                 vec![ProbeType::QuickScan],
             ),
